principal_and_attorney_in_fact.principal_additional_name_address_line: 7423 Willow Bend Court, Apt. 2B, Sacramento, CA 95821

powers_granted.powers_granted_description_line_1: Attorney-in-fact is authorized to sign, execute, and deliver all documents necessary to complete the sale of the residential real property located at 7423 Willow Bend Court, Apt. 2B, Sacramento, CA 95821, including but not limited to the purchase agreement, escrow instructions, grant deed, closing disclosures, and any required affidavits or certifications related to title, tax, or occupancy.
powers_granted.powers_granted_description_line_2: Attorney-in-fact may communicate and negotiate with the real estate broker, buyer, escrow company, title company, mortgage lender, homeowners’ association, and any city or county offices as needed to facilitate closing, and may receive and disburse closing funds on behalf of the principal solely for the purpose of completing this transaction.
powers_granted.powers_granted_description_line_3: This power is strictly limited to the above-described real estate transaction and does not authorize the attorney-in-fact to engage in any other financial transactions, open or close accounts, incur debt, or otherwise bind the principal beyond what is customary and reasonably necessary to complete the sale and transfer of the specified property.

term_of_limited_power_of_attorney.period_of_limited_power_of_attorney: This Limited Power of Attorney shall be effective for the period beginning on the effective date stated below and shall automatically terminate on the termination date stated below, unless revoked in writing by the principal at an earlier date.
